title: Beware the Chinese bootlegs
wikitext:
[]: Beware the Chinese bootlegs! Post by Zeak » Sat Jun 07, 2008 12:29 am Rebuild went on sail Downunder and I was able to get my copy. It is sold as 1.0 not 1.1 like in Japan. It has english subs and Im even happier because the states dont have it yet. For people in the sydney area PM me as it is selling for $12 at the cheapest I could find it. Ill upload the images as soon as I get home. Im so happy I finaly got a real version of rebuild. The Title on the dvd in the menu is Evangelion New Movie: The Beginning

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Jun 07, 2008 1:05 am You suck.. I mean, that's cool =P Lucky.

[]: Post by Jinroh » Sat Jun 07, 2008 3:08 am That's called a chinese bootleg. Why would you want to buy that ****?

[]: Post by Zeak » Sat Jun 07, 2008 3:12 am I doubt a real shop would sell a bootleg and seemings its PAL with english subs. Also every shop that sells DVD's has to have a licence to sell the stuff no bootlegs. I have a bootleg copy I got a few months ago and its shit compaired to this

[]: Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sat Jun 07, 2008 3:13 am Man, talk about a bait and switch.

[]: Post by Zeak » Sat Jun 07, 2008 3:17 am ThroneofDravaris wrote: Man, talk about a bait and switch.

[]: Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sat Jun 07, 2008 3:20 am This is the worst day ever.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sat Jun 07, 2008 4:47 am How do subs compare to the fan made ones? P.S I hate you.

[]: Post by Zeak » Sat Jun 07, 2008 4:48 am There a little odd in some places but overall there quite close. Its funny Misato swears a little

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Sat Jun 07, 2008 4:49 am I'm calling bootleg too. It's very doubtful this would go on sale without any announcement. And keeping the (ed)chinese text for the menus seems rather odd, as well as the "New Movie" thing when everyone who cares knows it as Rebuild (even more odd when it's different on the cover) - even if it is legit, I'm not sure if I'd want that kind of translation. :P I didn't see anything about it on the publisher's hp either, aside the original announcement that it's in their line-up and the online stores I checked showed zero result too. Have you seen it in any other stores than the one where you got it?

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sat Jun 07, 2008 4:51 am Hey if it's got DVD quality and ready made english subtitles. who cares?

[]: Post by Zeak » Sat Jun 07, 2008 4:52 am As a matter of fact its In quite a few stores from Bondi Junction through the CBD and in chatswood. There around you just have to look in the right places (something i have become very good at). There is one in the video shop for rent in the Civic in north sydney

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Sat Jun 07, 2008 5:11 am Zeak wrote: As a matter of fact its In quite a few stores from Bondi Junction through the CBD and in chatswood. There around you just have to look in the right places (something i have become very good at). There is one in the video shop for rent in the Civic in north sydney

[]: Post by Zeak » Sat Jun 07, 2008 5:13 am It is better quallity then the rip i ended up with before.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 07, 2008 8:44 am It's a Hong Kong bootleg. End of thread.
